list.name: article
list.label: Article (suivi prix)
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT designation || ' — ' || reference_fournisseur AS __text, reference_fournisseur AS __value FROM achat_ligne WHERE est_produit AND prix_unitaire>0 ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(montant_ht),0) AS ht FROM achat WHERE date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(montant_ttc),0) AS ttc FROM achat WHERE date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
SELECT count(*) AS factures FROM achat WHERE date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
SELECT count(DISTINCT fournisseur_id) AS fournisseurs FROM achat WHERE date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
SELECT round(SUM(montant_ht)/NULLIF(count(*),0),2) AS panier FROM achat WHERE date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

SELECT round(100.0*SUM(al.montant_ht) FILTER (WHERE NOT al.est_produit)/NULLIF(SUM(al.montant_ht),0),1) AS part_frais FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id WHERE a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

SELECT fo.nom AS fournisseur, SUM(a.montant_ht) AS ht FROM achat a JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT fo.nom AS fournisseur, SUM(a.montant_ht) AS ht FROM achat a JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT fo.nom AS fournisseur, count(*) AS factures FROM achat a JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT fo.nom AS fournisseur, round(SUM(a.montant_ht)/NULLIF(count(*),0),2) AS panier FROM achat a JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT fo.nom AS fournisseur, round(SUM(al.poids_kg),1) AS kg FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE al.est_produit AND al.poids_kg>0 AND a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT fo.nom AS fournisseur, round(100.0*SUM(al.montant_ht) FILTER (WHERE NOT al.est_produit)/NULLIF(SUM(al.montant_ht),0),1) AS part_frais FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT date_trunc('week',date_facture)::timestamp AS "time", SUM(montant_ht) AS achats_ht FROM achat WHERE date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_facture::timestamp AS "time", SUM(SUM(montant_ht)) OVER (ORDER BY date_facture) AS cumule FROM achat WHERE date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY date_facture ORDER BY date_facture

panels.title: Achats HT par fournisseur et par semaine

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('week',a.date_facture)::timestamp AS "time", fo.nom AS metric, SUM(a.montant_ht) AS value FROM achat a JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT f.nom AS famille, SUM(al.montant_ht) AS ht FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id JOIN famille f ON f.id=al.famille_id WHERE al.famille_id IS NOT NULL AND a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT f.nom AS famille, round(SUM(al.poids_kg),1) AS kg FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id JOIN famille f ON f.id=al.famille_id WHERE al.famille_id IS NOT NULL AND al.poids_kg>0 AND a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Prix moyen au kg par famille (achats)

targets.rawSql: SELECT f.nom AS famille, round(SUM(al.montant_ht) FILTER (WHERE al.poids_kg>0)/NULLIF(SUM(al.poids_kg) FILTER (WHERE al.poids_kg>0),0),2) AS prix_kg FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id JOIN famille f ON f.id=al.famille_id WHERE al.famille_id IS NOT NULL AND a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(al.poids_kg) FILTER (WHERE al.poids_kg>0)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT al.designation AS article, fo.nom AS fournisseur, SUM(al.montant_ht) AS ht, round(SUM(al.poids_kg),1) AS kg FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE al.est_produit AND a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date GROUP BY al.designation, fo.nom ORDER BY ht DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT a.date_facture::timestamp AS "time", fo.nom AS metric, al.prix_unitaire AS value FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE al.reference_fournisseur = '$article' AND al.prix_unitaire>0 AND a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Évolution de prix par référence (premier → dernier achat)

targets.rawSql: WITH px AS (SELECT al.reference_fournisseur ref, al.designation, al.prix_unitaire pu, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY al.reference_fournisseur ORDER BY a.date_facture) rn_a, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY al.reference_fournisseur ORDER BY a.date_facture DESC) rn_d FROM achat_ligne al JOIN achat a ON a.id=al.achat_id WHERE al.est_produit AND al.prix_unitaire>0 AND a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) SELECT min(designation) AS article, round(max(pu) FILTER (WHERE rn_a=1),2) AS premier, round(max(pu) FILTER (WHERE rn_d=1),2) AS dernier, round(100*(max(pu) FILTER (WHERE rn_d=1)-max(pu) FILTER (WHERE rn_a=1))/NULLIF(max(pu) FILTER (WHERE rn_a=1),0),1) AS evol_pct, count(*) AS nb_achats FROM px GROUP BY ref HAVING count(*)>=2 ORDER BY evol_pct DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT a.date_facture AS date, fo.nom AS fournisseur, a.numero_facture AS facture, a.montant_ht AS ht, a.montant_tva AS tva, a.montant_ttc AS ttc FROM achat a JOIN fournisseur fo ON fo.id=a.fournisseur_id WHERE a.date_facture BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date ORDER BY a.date_facture DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT 20
